---
title: ""
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.site-container}
::: {.hero-grid}

::: {.hero-content}

<div class="hero-status">
Ph.D. Researcher · Temple University
</div>

<h1 class="hero-name">
<span>Amaka Peace</span>
<span class="accent">Onebunne</span>
</h1>

<p class="hero-role">
Researcher in AI, Communication, and Society
</p>

<p class="hero-affiliation">
Temple University · Philadelphia, Pennsylvania
</p>

<p class="hero-summary">
I study the relationships among artificial intelligence, communication,
institutions, and public life. Combining computational and qualitative methods,
I examine questions of trust, governance, information integrity, and
technological power, with particular attention to Africa and the Global South.
</p>

<div class="hero-actions">

<a class="hero-button button-primary" href="#research">
View Research
</a>

<a class="hero-button button-secondary"
   href="assets/documents/amaka-onebunne-cv.pdf"
   target="_blank">
Download CV
</a>

</div>

<div class="hero-links">

<a href="mailto:amaka.onebunne@temple.edu">
Email
</a>

<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=UtUtPZwAAAAJ&hl=en"
   target="_blank">
Google Scholar
</a>

<a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-3029-5987"
   target="_blank">
ORCID
</a>

<a href="https://github.com/ahmypeace"
   target="_blank">
GitHub
</a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/amakapeace/"
   target="_blank">
LinkedIn
</a>

</div>

:::

::: {.hero-image}
![](assets/images/amaka-headshot.jpg){alt="Portrait of Amaka Peace Onebunne"}
:::

:::
:::
:::


::: {#research .site-section}
::: {.site-container}

::: {.research-intro}

<div>
<p class="section-label">Research Focus</p>
</div>

<div>

<h2 class="section-title">Areas of Inquiry</h2>

<p class="section-description">
My work sits at the intersection of Human–Machine Communication,
AI governance, computational social science, and critical technology studies.
</p>

</div>

:::


::: {.research-grid}

::: {.research-card}
<span class="research-number">01</span>

### Responsible AI and Corporate Accountability

Examining how AI companies define safety, responsibility, evaluation,
and institutional accountability in official governance documents.

<a class="research-card-link"
   href="projects/responsible-ai-framing.html">
Explore project
</a>
:::


::: {.research-card}
<span class="research-number">02</span>

### AI Expansion and the Global South

Studying how Africa and Latin America are constructed as emerging markets,
testing grounds, and strategic frontiers for artificial intelligence.

<a class="research-card-link"
   href="projects/speculative-markets.html">
Explore project
</a>
:::


::: {.research-card}
<span class="research-number">03</span>

### Synthetic Media and Information Integrity

Investigating how African news organizations frame deepfakes, political risk,
criminality, governance, and emerging forms of synthetic media.

<a class="research-card-link"
   href="projects/deepfake-framing.html">
Explore project
</a>
:::


::: {.research-card}
<span class="research-number">04</span>

### Digital Culture and Human–Machine Communication

Exploring how people interpret intelligent technologies and how digital media
create new forms of intimacy, identity, knowledge, and social interaction.

<a class="research-card-link"
   href="research.html">
View research
</a>
:::

:::
:::
:::


::: {.site-section}
::: {.site-container}

::: {.section-header}

<div>
<p class="section-label">Selected Work</p>
</div>

<div>

<h2 class="section-title">
Research across AI, media, institutions, and society
</h2>

</div>

:::


::: {.work-list}

::: {.work-item}

<div class="work-year">2026</div>

<div>

<h3 class="work-title">
Sociotechnical Imaginaries of AI Expansion: Constructing the Global South as Speculative Market
</h3>

<p class="work-description">
An analysis of how corporate, policy, and investment narratives construct
the Global South as an emerging market and strategic frontier for artificial
intelligence.
</p>

</div>

<div class="work-meta">
4S Annual Meeting
</div>

:::


::: {.work-item}

<div class="work-year">2025</div>

<div>

<h3 class="work-title">
Journalists’ Perception of Artificial Intelligence: The Case of Nigerian Newsrooms
</h3>

<p class="work-description">
A qualitative study of how Nigerian journalists understand, adopt,
and negotiate artificial intelligence within newsroom practice.
</p>

</div>

<div class="work-meta">
Digital Journalism
</div>

:::


::: {.work-item}

<div class="work-year">2026</div>

<div>

<h3 class="work-title">
Algorithmic Gaze and the Feedback Loop of Othering
</h3>

<p class="work-description">
A study of how algorithmic visibility and recommendation systems reproduce
stereotypical representations and reinforce recurring patterns of othering.
</p>

</div>

<div class="work-meta">
Research Article
</div>

:::

:::

<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="hero-button button-secondary"
   href="publications.html">
View All Publications
</a>
</div>

:::
:::


::: {.site-section}
::: {.site-container}

::: {.section-header}

<div>
<p class="section-label">Latest</p>
</div>

<div>

<h2 class="section-title">
News, writing, and public scholarship
</h2>

<p class="section-description">
Updates from my research, conference activities, publications, and writing
on artificial intelligence, communication, and digital society.
</p>

</div>

:::


::: {.research-grid}

::: {.research-card}
<span class="research-number">News</span>

### Recent Updates

Paper acceptances, conference presentations, awards, fellowships,
research milestones, and other professional updates.

<a class="research-card-link" href="news.html">
View news
</a>
:::


::: {.research-card}
<span class="research-number">Writing</span>

### Essays and Commentary

Research explainers, Medium articles, conference reflections,
and public-facing writing on AI and society.

<a class="research-card-link" href="writing.html">
Read my writing
</a>
:::

:::
:::
:::


::: {.site-section .contact-section}
::: {.site-container}

::: {.contact-grid}

<div>

<p class="section-label">Get in Touch</p>

<h2 class="section-title">
Research collaborations, speaking, and scholarly opportunities
</h2>

<a class="contact-email"
   href="mailto:amaka.onebunne@temple.edu">
amaka.onebunne@temple.edu
</a>

</div>

<div>

<p>
I welcome conversations about collaborative research, computational
communication, responsible AI, Human–Machine Communication, and emerging
technologies.
</p>

</div>

:::
:::
:::
